sections.heading: Problem Statement
sections.content: What specific pain does this sub-feature solve? Keep it to 2-3 sentences. (e.g., 'Editing raw JSON doc files is error-prone. The doc manager lets users edit structured documentation in the browser without risking malformed JSON.')

sections.heading: User Stories
sections.content:
Use the format US-XX-## for sub-feature stories (XX = sub-feature abbreviation, ## = number).

**US-XX-01 — [Story title]**
As a [user], I want to [action] so that [value].

**US-XX-02 — [Story title]**
As a [user], I want to [action] so that [value].

sections.heading: Current Capabilities
sections.content:
Quick status table of what's already built:

| Capability | Status |
|---|---|
| [Feature A] | Done |
| [Feature B] | In progress |
| [Feature C] | Not started |

sections.heading: Backlog
sections.content:
UX improvements and enhancements that are planned but not yet prioritized. One paragraph per item — state the problem, then the proposed solution.

**[Enhancement name]** — [What's wrong today]. [What we'd do about it].
